deepRecoveryTasks.reason: The captured VISITING_STUDENT_PAGE (vumc.org/gme/visiting-residents) is exclusively for residents/fellows in ACGME-accredited programs (Tier 2), not pre-residency medical students or IMG observers. No Tier 1 observership/visiting medical student/clinical elective page was captured, and no explicit negative quote was found.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow search: query vumc.org for 'visiting medical student', 'clinical elective', 'observership', and 'School of Medicine visiting student' pages. If absent, capture an explicit negative quote or School-of-Medicine-level statement.

unfollowedSignals: GME nav references 'Elective Away Rotations' (away rotations FROM VUMC) — confirm whether a reciprocal incoming visiting-medical-student elective page exists
GME nav references 'Visiting Residents' which only routes to the Tier 2 page; no Tier 1 visiting-medical-student equivalent was captured
verdictSummary: Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims; all 52 claims correctly classified as FUTURE_LANE_ONLY across GME, Careers, and Visiting Residents (Tier 2) sources. No over-promotion, no scope conflicts, no eligibility/duration/fee/contact overclaims. Several A1/A2 nav-item duplicates flagged for downstream dedupe. Tier 1 (pre-residency USCE) is FAIL_WEAK — no observership / visiting medical student page captured and no explicit negative; A4 recovery task proposed. Outcome reflects ledger consistency, not confirmed absence of Tier 1 opportunity.
